B.R. Goyal Infra.thesis: Roads/highways/bridges EPC. FY26 sales +61%, PAT +78%. Ashish Chugh-style value screen pass. Risk: ₹128 Cr contingent liabilities (43% of mcap) — verify AR before sizing. IPO 2025, thin liquidity.
B.R. Goyal Infra.verdict: WATCH — dig contingent liability note in AR
B.R. Goyal Infra.name: B.R. Goyal Infra

Pasupati Acrylon.thesis: Acrylic fibre manufacturer. Qtr profit +133%, sales +45%. MCap ~₹544 Cr, more liquid than micro-caps in same screen. ROCE 21%, debt-light profile on screen.
Pasupati Acrylon.name: Pasupati Acrylon

Shri Techtex.thesis: Technical textiles. ROCE 23%, Qtr profit +88%. Mid-small cap with improving execution. Part of Chugh-style hidden gems cluster.
Shri Techtex.name: Shri Techtex

TGV Sraac.thesis: Chemicals, largest name in value screen (~₹1,110 Cr MCap). Qtr profit +29%, P/E ~8.4. Easier to build position size vs micro-caps.
TGV Sraac.verdict: DIG DEEPER — best liquidity in Bucket A
TGV Sraac.name: TGV Sraac

Jay Bee Laminations.thesis: Transformer laminations supplier — grid supply chain, not OEM. @raghavwadhwa cash-cow thread: 59% 3Y sales growth, strong CFO vs MCap. Contrarian vs Indo Tech / Hitachi froth.
Jay Bee Laminations.name: Jay Bee Laminations

The Anup Engineering.thesis: Process equipment / engineered products. Cash-cow thread pick. ₹169 Cr CFO, MCap/CF ~34. Grid/industrial capex beneficiary without transformer OEM premium.
The Anup Engineering.name: The Anup Engineering

HPL Electric.thesis: Metering + LV switchgear + wires. OB >₹30B. P/E ~30 vs 46 median — not deep value but cheaper than grid OEMs at 100x+. Smart-meter rollout cyclicality in Q1.
HPL Electric.name: HPL Electric

Modern Insulators.thesis: India's largest porcelain insulator maker (Siemens collab, 132-765kV, 50+ countries). Global lead times 12-24 months, 3 domestic players hold ~75% capacity, no additions in 10 years. Q3 FY26 revenue +60%, OPM 17.8%. Risk: stock re-rated ~60% since May thread (P/E ~28); ₹118 Cr unprovided tax pending Modern Denim merger; ₹57.6 Cr loans to loss-making related entity; no concalls.
Modern Insulators.source: ValuePickr — Modern Insulators: Keeping the Current in Line (active 8 Jul)
Modern Insulators.name: Modern Insulators

Kalyani Cast-Tech.thesis: Castings + ISO cargo containers, near debt-free, ROCE 31%, promoter 59.5%. Big swing: 115-acre integrated park — container expansion (+10,000 units) plus wagon plant (phase-1 ~2,400/yr, ramping to 8,000). Risk: TTM sales only +8% — container base slowing; thesis rests on wagon execution not yet in numbers; P/E ~30 not cheap.
Kalyani Cast-Tech.source: ValuePickr — Kalyani Cast-Tech thread (active 7 Jul) + Zen Nivesh substack
Kalyani Cast-Tech.name: Kalyani Cast-Tech

Transrail Lighting.thesis: Power T&D EPC + tower/conductor/mono-pole mfg. OB ₹16,361 Cr (2.4x sales), CFO ₹817 Cr FY26. Capt_Cool 4% alloc. P/E ~16 vs Hitachi 140x — clearest contrarian grid play.
Transrail Lighting.name: Transrail Lighting

JM Financial.thesis: Financial conglomerate at ~book value. TIA 20-20 pitch: capital misallocation fix = rerating. Asymmetric: 20-30% downside / 200-300% upside (presenter frame). Boring, ignored.
JM Financial.name: JM Financial

Windlas Biotech.thesis: CDMO + trade generics. TIA pick: ~₹200 Cr cash on ₹1,400 Cr mcap, promoter skipped buyback. No fintwitter hype. Verify latest quarterly before acting.
Windlas Biotech.name: Windlas Biotech

Ultramarine Pigments.thesis: iThought PMS pick. Surfactant + inorganic pigments. Capex done, low debt, export growth. Specialty chemicals compounder candidate.
Ultramarine Pigments.name: Ultramarine Pigments

Bhagyanagar India.verdict: WATCH — demerger special sit, entry discipline after 2.4x run
Bhagyanagar India.thesis: Copper recycling + value-added copper products; copper business demerging into Tieramet Ltd (record date pending). Value-added mix 62% of FY26 revenue vs 43% FY24. Risk: stock ~2.4x since March thread (156 to 383); Rs 52 Cr preferential at Rs 348 with more tranches planned — dilution ongoing; EBITDA tied to copper price (~3% of price/kg), copper fell 10% May-Jun.
Bhagyanagar India.source: ValuePickr — Bhagyanagar India copper recycling thread (active 11 Jul)
Bhagyanagar India.name: Bhagyanagar India

Goodluck India.thesis: Steel tubes/structures/forgings with a defence swing: Rs 400-500 Cr artillery-shell plant (Sikandrabad), ~4 lakh shells/yr capacity by H2 FY27, guided Rs 600-650 Cr defence revenue FY28 at 30-35% EBITDA vs ~10% core OPM. Risk: TTM sales +4% and P/E ~29 — market already paying for a ramp not yet in numbers; core tubes business flat.
Goodluck India.name: Goodluck India

Filatex India.thesis: Polyester filament yarn at ~15x P/E, low debt. Rs 690 Cr capex: Rs 300 Cr Ecosis — India's first commercial-scale textile-to-textile chemical recycling plant (26,750 TPA), commissioning Sep 2026 — plus yarn expansion and steam monetisation. FY26 PAT +37% on flat sales. Risk: commodity yarn spreads; recycling tech unproven at commercial scale.
Filatex India.name: Filatex India

South West Pinnacle Exploration.thesis: Drilling and exploration services for coal, gold and critical minerals — picks-and-shovels on India's mineral block auctions (46 blocks auctioned across 6 tranches by Apr 2026). Order book Rs 581 Cr (~2.4x FY26 revenue Rs 243 Cr, +35%; PAT +122%). Risk: Alara rights-issue commitment (overseas mining bet), warrant/equity raises; lumpy contract execution.
South West Pinnacle Exploration.source: ValuePickr — South West Pinnacle thread (active 11 Jul) + Zen Nivesh substack
South West Pinnacle Exploration.name: South West Pinnacle Exploration
